programs.title: Murderers and Their Mothers: Peter Sutcliffe: The Yorkshire Ripper
programs.desc: In this episode, serial killer Peter Sutcliffe terrorized the North of England for six years in the 1970s.

programs.title: Murderers and Their Mothers: Michael Ryan: The Hungerford Massacre
programs.desc: In 1987, Michael Ryan committed Britain’s deadliest massacre of its time.

programs.title: Fred & Rose West: Love & Murder
programs.desc: A chilling look at Fred & Rose West, one of history's most disturbing serial killer couples.

programs.title: Gordon Behind Bars: Episode 1
programs.desc: Gordon arrives at the notorious HM Prison Brixton, in the hopes of molding prisoners into working cooks.

programs.title: Gordon Behind Bars: Episode 2
programs.desc: As Gordon's business gets busier, the prison's stringent systems and routines start getting to him.

programs.title: Gordon Behind Bars: Episode 3
programs.desc: After two months of success, Gordon now wants to expand the prisoner's food selections and go commercial.
